text: EH-104 Phase B verification: no Docker on workstation so pnpm test:eh104-db and live preflight could not run locally; had to rely on static checks + CI database job wiring. A documented disposable Supabase path or guaranteed CI artifact link would prevent this gate ambiguity.

Repository exploration tools returned stale/truncated file views and Bash treated shell syntax inconsistently; stable line-range reads and POSIX-compatible shell guidance would prevent false inspection results.
openspec status cannot resolve archived changes and lists only active changes without directing callers to the archive path; archive-aware status or a clear hint would avoid a failed lookup.

OpenSpec strict validation rejected a requirement phrased with 'may' despite the surrounding mandatory lifecycle; surfacing SHALL/MUST wording requirements in generated artifact instructions without truncation would prevent the failed validation round.
